dict.string: çŒ«çˆª maoclaw uses Apple Events to automate other apps when an approved workflow requires it.
çŒ«çˆª maoclaw can capture photos or video when you explicitly allow a camera-based workflow.
çŒ«çˆª maoclaw can share your location with an agent workflow only when you explicitly request it.
çŒ«çˆª maoclaw can share your location with an agent workflow only while the app is in use.
çŒ«çˆª maoclaw can capture microphone audio for voice-triggered or audio-aware workflows when you approve it.
çŒ«çˆª maoclaw can use on-device speech recognition for voice-triggered workflows when you approve it.
